steps.instruction: Keep only Gmail messages from the inbox or sent mail that are grievance-related and were sent or received within the last hour relative to the workflow run time. A grievance-related email includes complaints, dissatisfaction, escalations, disputes, service/product issues, billing complaints, delivery issues, support failures, employee grievances, legal/compliance concerns, refund/replacement demands, or requests to resolve a problem. Exclude newsletters, promotions, routine notifications, receipts with no complaint, spam, and unrelated operational emails.
